changeSet.author: analyze-logs
changeSet.sql: ALTER TABLE static_ua ADD COLUMN pattern TEXT
ALTER TABLE static_ua ADD COLUMN sort_order INTEGER

UPDATE static_ua SET pattern = (SELECT pattern FROM static_ua_classifier WHERE static_ua_classifier.ua_name = static_ua.ua_name), sort_order = (SELECT sort_order FROM static_ua_classifier WHERE static_ua_classifier.ua_name = static_ua.ua_name)
